# Build dependencies for Debian 13 (Trixie)
# Used by build.sh --install-deps when running on Debian Trixie
ca-certificates
git
build-essential
cmake
ninja-build
pkg-config
qt6-base-dev
qt6-base-dev-tools
qt6-declarative-dev
qt6-declarative-dev-tools
qt6-multimedia-dev
qt6-connectivity-dev
qt6-websockets-dev
qt6-tools-dev
qt6-tools-dev-tools
qt6-l10n-tools
libqt6sql6-sqlite
libdbus-1-dev
file
